remarks: Investment opportunity. Tenant in place with lease until 3/15/2027. Charming 1-Bedroom in Sought-After Courtland East. Open floor plan with a new kitchen and island, spacious living/dining area, and a working fireplace that adds cozy charm. Features include hardwood floors, new windows, and French doors leading to a front porch with building entrance. The large bedroom offers plenty of closet space, and the remodeled bathroom features a glass-enclosed shower and extra storage. Located in the desirable Courtland East community, surrounded by park-like grounds, with reserved parking, ample guest parking, and heat and hot water included in the common charges. No rental restrictions and one pet per unit accepted. Convenient location-great for commuters! Tenant's lease expires 3/15/2027.
